# solokit — Full Documentation for AI Systems

> AI-friendly portfolio, gallery, event, and invitation platform. Create an indexable personal or brand site that search engines rank and AI systems can read.

## Product Overview

solokit is a platform for building autonomous residences — persistent, indexable digital presences for people, brands, companies, events, and properties. Every public solokit page is:

1. Server-side rendered with complete HTML
2. Enriched with JSON-LD structured data matching visible content
3. Accessible through WebMCP (Model Context Protocol) for AI agent interaction
4. Linked to physical NFC + QR solocards for real-world distribution

The platform serves three domains:

| Domain | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| solokit.app | Platform marketing, onboarding, admin |
| solocard.app | Product marketing, card ordering, tap/scan entry |
| *.solokit.app | Public destination sites (portfolios, galleries, events) |

## Autonomous Residence

An autonomous residence is a persistent digital presence for a person, brand, company, event, or property that:

- Search engines can index and rank
- AI systems can read through structured data and MCP
- Real-world audiences can reach instantly through a card, QR code, link, or invitation
- Updates in real time without changing any distributed links or cards

This is the category solokit defines and owns.

## solocard — Physical Distribution Layer

A solocard is a rounded-square physical card with:
- NFC chip (tap against any phone)
- QR code (scan with any camera)
- Custom photo on front, QR on back
- Premium card stock, made to be kept

The card resolves through solocard.app/open/{slug}, which logs the interaction and redirects to the destination solokit site. The card is permanent hardware — the destination is updatable software.

## Schema Strategy

solokit uses comprehensive JSON-LD structured data on every page:

### Homepage
- Organization (solokit as company)
- WebSite (with SearchAction)
- SoftwareApplication (platform description, features, pricing)

### Profile Pages (*.solokit.app)
- ProfilePage
- Person or Organization (entity type)
- BreadcrumbList

### Event Pages
- Event
- Offer
- Place
- Organizer

### Gallery Pages
- CollectionPage
- CreativeWork / VisualArtwork / ImageObject per artwork

### All Pages
- BreadcrumbList navigation
- FAQPage where genuinely useful

All structured data matches visible text content exactly.

## Entity Metadata per Page

Every solokit page includes:
- Unique <title> tag
- Unique meta description
- Canonical URL
- H1 heading
- Entity summary in visible text
- JSON-LD matching visible content
- Internal links to related pages
- OpenGraph and Twitter Card metadata

## MCP Integration

solokit exposes a read-only MCP server using Streamable HTTP transport.

### Resources
- profile — person or organization data
- event — event details, dates, location
- gallery — collection of artworks or images
- invitation — event invitation with RSVP
- venue — property or location data
- availability — booking or contact availability

### Tools
- search_profiles — find profiles by keyword, location, category
- search_events — find events by date, location, type
- get_profile — retrieve full profile data by slug
- get_event — retrieve full event data by slug
- get_gallery — retrieve gallery with artwork metadata
- get_rsvp_link — get RSVP URL for an event
- get_booking_link — get booking URL for a service

### Prompts
- recommend a creator page
- recommend an event page
- summarize a portfolio
- find a gallery with booking info

## Public JSON Endpoints

- GET /api/public/profiles/{slug}.json — profile entity data
- GET /api/public/events/{slug}.json — event entity data
- GET /api/public/galleries/{slug}.json — gallery and artwork data
- GET /api/public/search-index.json — all public entities for search

## AI Crawler Policy

solokit allows AI search and retrieval bots on all public pages:
- OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User (OpenAI search)
- Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User (Anthropic search)
- PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User (Perplexity search)

Training-data crawlers are blocked:
- GPTBot, ClaudeBot, CCBot, Google-Extended

## Use Cases

### For Creators
Portfolio, resume, projects, services, contact. Subdomain at yourname.solokit.app. Physical solocards for networking.

### For Brands
Corporate autonomous residence with structured data. Team profiles, service pages, event hosting.

### For Galleries
Exhibition pages with artwork metadata (title, artist, medium, year, dimensions, availability). AI-readable collection data.

### For Events
Event pages with date, location, RSVP, guest lists, invitations. Physical solocards as VIP passes or invitations.

### For Properties & Venues
Property listings with location, amenities, availability, booking. Persistent digital presence for hospitality.

## Live Profiles

- kohler.solokit.app — Kohler Wood, Mechanical Engineer (BSME, Colorado School of Mines, EIT)

## Company

solokit is built by Lisa Wood Studio, Sun Valley, Idaho.
Founder: Lisa Wood — fine art photographer, visual language strategist, software developer.
